---
title: "The Economic and Ecological Returns of Phovolotaics Allivation Program"
description: "About Event item."
author: "Yifei Yuan"
date: "2025-09-03"
categories: [research, paper]
image: "PPAP.JPG"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

[![](PPAP.JPG){width="90%"}](https://drganghe.github.io/quarto-academic-website-template/)
